name: ebenova-vigil-fraud-alert
description: Proximity-based card fraud detection via GPS. Authorize transactions, manage cards, submit GPS, compute risk scores, run AI fraud analysis (Claude Haiku), and generate AML compliance reports (Claude Sonnet).

tools.name: vigil_authorize
tools.description: Authorize a card transaction using GPS proximity engine. Returns approve/decline with reason code and distance.

tools.name: vigil_register_card
tools.description: Register a card for proximity monitoring. Set home location, radius, and mode.

tools.name: vigil_update_card
tools.description: Update card settings — mode (normal/travel/lockdown), radius, travel plans.

tools.name: vigil_submit_gps
tools.description: Submit device GPS location for a card. Powers proximity-based authorization.

tools.name: vigil_get_risk_score
tools.description: Get live risk score (0–1.0) with contributing factors breakdown.

tools.name: vigil_analyze_transaction
tools.description: AI fraud pattern analysis using Claude Haiku. Returns risk level and indicators.

tools.name: vigil_generate_aml_report
tools.description: Generate AML compliance report using Claude Sonnet. Scale+ plan required.

tools.name: vigil_emergency_lockdown
tools.description: Immediately lock a card — blocks all transactions until manually unlocked.
